title: Decoding Higher Education
text:
While university placement data is public, there is a lack of analytical perspective on how factors like faculty size and location impact a department’s popularity. This project identifies the underlying drivers of success for Industrial Engineering departments in Turkey.
Team Name: [Let It Happen]
Team Members: * Yusuf Bora Çavdar
* Onur Furkan Gök
